title: Order relative to authorizing the joint committee on Cannabis Policy to make an investigation and study of certain current Senate documents relative to enable private donations to the cannabis social equity trust fund.

abstracts.abstract: Senate, March 5, 2026 -- The committee on Cannabis Policy, to whom was referred the petitions (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 85) of Kevin Gilnack, Bruce E. Tarr and Manny Cruz for legislation to enable private donations to the cannabis social equity trust fund, report the accompanying Order (Senate, No. 2985).

actions.description:
Reported from the committee on Cannabis Policy
 (under JR10)
Referred to the committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

related_entities.name: committee on Rules of the two branches, acting concurrently

actions.description: Discharged to the committee on Senate Rules
